privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the target column IDs exactly match 'zotero-items-column-dateAdded' and 'zotero-items-column-itemType' by extracting and inspecting the Jurism 6.0.30m3 source code (jurism.jar/chrome/content/zotero/xpcom/itemTreeView.js). The Jurism database is synthetically populated via a python script containing hardcoded details for 10 real historical US Supreme Court cases and law review articles (e.g., Brown v. Board of Education, Marbury v. Madison) to provide visual context.
